title: PojavLauncher Horor
body:
**This modpack gives the game a horror vibe. It adds creepy creatures and a dark atmosphere to the game. And it’s all compatible with PojavLauncher.**

**This modpack adds Herobrine, the Man in the fog, the Stalker, and other mods that make your game scary.**

**The “The Knocker” mod adds a creature to the game that will follow you without you noticing.**

![A creature from the mod “The Knocker” is watching you in the night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1b5365e5a2b5ecb5f59ece2d81b5753ca9b0eb9.jpeg)

**The “From the Fog” mod adds Herobrin to the game.**

![A structure for summoning Herobrin, with Herobrin standing on it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/973c118074c08df1ba728825b0f59e15fdbce3fa.webp)

**The “Man in the Fog” mod adds a creature that appears at night and chases you.**

![The creature from the “Man in the Fog” mod stands in the fog and stares at you](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/632f63d9f37da71e7b82b7661feb60bf32333f85.png)

**The game features scary moments and loud noises**
